title: Grafana 12.4 — Traces Drilldown + TraceQL Metrics
description: Traces Drilldown went GA in 12.0 (replacing Aggregate-by / metrics-summary which was REMOVED — playbook item #10). 12.4 smoothed out TraceQL metrics: rate / quantile over trace data. This dashboard links out to the Drilldown app and shows Tempo's self-scrape health.

options.content:
### Traces Drilldown (GA in 12.0 · TraceQL metrics stabilized in 12.4)

- **[➡ Open Traces Drilldown](/a/grafana-exploretraces-app)**
- Query language: TraceQL — e.g. `{ service.name="checkout" && duration > 500ms }`
- **TraceQL metrics** (new): `{} | rate() by (service.name)` and similar aggregates replace the removed `metrics-summary` API.

### Breaking change (12.0)

The old **Aggregate by** UI and `/api/metrics/summary` endpoint were REMOVED. Any dashboard that hit them shows broken panels — migrate to TraceQL metrics. See [playbook item #10](https://github.com/gpadidala/grafana12-oss/blob/main/docs/01-breaking-changes-matrix.md#10--tempo--aggregate-by--metrics-summary-api-removed-120) for the rewrite recipe.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le)(rate(tempo_query_frontend_query_duration_seconds_bucket[$__rate_interval]))) or on() vector(0)
